zh.lifeSummary: 當Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir於1243年出生在俄羅斯Калужская областьТаруса時，她的父親Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa18歲，母親Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod22歲。她於1248年與Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir在俄羅斯特維也特維也結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir于1243年出生在俄罗斯Калужская областьТаруса时，她的父亲Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa18岁，母亲Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod22岁。她于1248年与Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir在俄罗斯特維也特維也结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年享年70岁。

variants.name: Marin
meanings: Medieval variant of Mervyn , resulting from the regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. Modern use may represent a transferred use of the surname derived from this in the Middle Ages. It is popular in the United States, where it is associated in particular with the American singer Marvin Gaye ( 1939–84 ) and the boxer Marvin Hagler ( b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir was born in 1243, in tarusa, Kaluga Oblast, Russia, her father, Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa, was 18 and her mother, Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod, was 22. She married Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir in 1248, in Tver', Tver', Russia. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1313, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir est née en 1243, à tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russie, son père, Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir en 1248, à Tver', Tver', Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1313, à l’âge de 70 ans.

Sie hat 1248 in Tver', Tver', Russland Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1313 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir è nata il nel 1243 nel tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russia, sua padre, Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir nel 1248, nel Tver', Tver', Russia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1313, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimirが1243年にロシアКалужская областьТарусаで生まれた時，父Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusaは18歳，母Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorodは22歳であった。1248年にロシアトバー'トバー'でYaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1313年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir(이)가 1243년 러시아 Калужская область Таруса에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1248년 러시아 트버' 트버'에서 Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir родилась в 1243 г. в местности Таруса, Калужская область, Россия, её отцу по имени Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir в 1248 г. в местности твир', твир', Россия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1313 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
